ddls:
CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "property_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "property_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "amenities" (
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each amenity */,
  "amenity_name" TEXT /* Name of the amenity */,
  "amenity_description" TEXT /* Description of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("amenity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the property */,
  "bed" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "bath" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "sqft" TEXT /* Square footage of the property */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area where the property is located */,
  "sub_area" TEXT /* Sub-area where the property is located */,
  "brokerage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brokerage representing the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "parking_spaces" INTEGER /* Number of parking spaces */,
  "garage_type" TEXT /* Type of garage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_brokerage_id FOREIGN KEY ("brokerage_id") REFERENCES brokerages ("brokerage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_property_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("property_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brokerages" (
  "brokerage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brokerage */,
  "brokerage_name" TEXT /* Name of the brokerage company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the brokerage */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the brokerage */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brokerage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brokerage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "brokerage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brokerage the agent belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "profile_description" TEXT /* Profile description of the agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_agents_brokerage_id FOREIGN KEY ("brokerage_id") REFERENCES brokerages ("brokerage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "listings" (
  "listing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each listing */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being listed */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent managing the listing */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date the listing was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, pending) */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the listing expires */,
  "listing_price" TEXT /* Price of the listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("listing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_listings_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property the image belongs to */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_images_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_amenities" (
  "property_amenity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property-amenity association */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "amenity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the amenity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_amenity_id FOREIGN KEY ("amenity_id") REFERENCES amenities ("amenity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_amenities_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, buyer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each property type
Number of bedrooms in the property
Number of bathrooms in the property
Area where the property is located
Sub-area where the property is located
ID of the brokerage representing the property
Contact email for inquiries about the brokerage
Contact phone number for the brokerage
ID of the brokerage the agent belongs to
ID of the property being listed
ID of the agent managing the listing
Status of the listing (e.g., active, sold, pending)
ID of the property the image belongs to

Role of the user (e.g., admin, agent, buyer)
